program DebugFull;

{$mode objfpc}{$H+}

uses Math, SysUtils;

const
  PI = 3.1415926535;

type
  POINTRANGE  = 1..100;
  NPOINTS     = 2..100;
  NPTYPE      = 3..100;
  NUMQUADS    = 1..3;
  COORDINATE  = array[POINTRANGE] of real;
  COMPTYPE    = (LT, EQ, GT);

var
  X, Y       : COORDINATE;
  NUMPOINTS  : integer;
  PARAMETERS : record
    LENGTH1, RADIUS1, EPSILON, AREA1, DIST, LENGTH2, RADIUS2, AREA2: real;
    Q_PTS, QUADS, N_PTS, K_PTS, A_PTS, B_PTS, C_PTS, D_PTS, E_PTS, F_PTS, G_PTS: integer;
  end;
  CMV: array[1..15] of boolean;
  inputStr: string;

function REALCOMPARE(A, B: real): COMPTYPE;
var
  scale, eps, diff: real;
begin
  scale := Abs(A);
  if Abs(B) > scale then
    scale := Abs(B);
  if scale = 0.0 then
  begin
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
    Exit;
  end;

  eps := 0.5e-5 * scale;
  diff := A - B;
  if diff > eps then
    REALCOMPARE := GT
  else if diff < -eps then
    REALCOMPARE := LT
  else
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
end;

function Distance(i, j: integer): real;
begin
  Distance := Sqrt(Sqr(X[i] - X[j]) + Sqr(Y[i] - Y[j]));
end;

function TriangleArea(i, j, k: integer): real;
begin
  TriangleArea := Abs((X[j] - X[i]) * (Y[k] - Y[i]) - (X[k] - X[i]) * (Y[j] - Y[i])) / 2.0;
end;

function Circumradius(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  a, b, c, area: real;
begin
  a := Distance(i, j);
  b := Distance(j, k);
  c := Distance(i, k);
  area := TriangleArea(i, j, k);
  
  if REALCOMPARE(area, 0.0) = EQ then
    Circumradius := 0.0
  else
    Circumradius := (a * b * c) / (4.0 * area);
end;

function AngleAtVertex(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  ax, ay, bx, by: real;
  dotProd, magA, magB, cosAngle: real;
begin
  ax := X[i] - X[j];
  ay := Y[i] - Y[j];
  bx := X[k] - X[j];
  by := Y[k] - Y[j];
  
  dotProd := ax * bx + ay * by;
  magA := Sqrt(Sqr(ax) + Sqr(ay));
  magB := Sqrt(Sqr(bx) + Sqr(by));
  
  if (REALCOMPARE(magA, 0.0) = EQ) or (REALCOMPARE(magB, 0.0) = EQ) then
  begin
    AngleAtVertex := -1.0;
    Exit;
  end;
  
  cosAngle := dotProd / (magA * magB);
  if cosAngle > 1.0 then
    cosAngle := 1.0
  else if cosAngle < -1.0 then
    cosAngle := -1.0;
  
  AngleAtVertex := ArcCos(cosAngle);
end;

function CheckLIC1: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  CheckLIC1 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do
    if REALCOMPARE(Distance(i, i + 1), PARAMETERS.LENGTH1) = GT then
    begin
      CheckLIC1 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
end;

function CheckLIC2: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  CheckLIC2 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
    if REALCOMPARE(Circumradius(i, i + 1, i + 2), PARAMETERS.RADIUS1) = GT then
    begin
      CheckLIC2 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
end;

function CheckLIC3: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
  angle: real;
begin
  CheckLIC3 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    angle := AngleAtVertex(i, i + 1, i + 2);
    if angle >= 0.0 then
      if (REALCOMPARE(angle, PI - PARAMETERS.EPSILON) = LT) or
         (REALCOMPARE(angle, PI + PARAMETERS.EPSILON) = GT) then
      begin
        CheckLIC3 := true;
        Exit;
      end;
  end;
end;

function CheckLIC4: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  CheckLIC4 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
    if REALCOMPARE(TriangleArea(i, i + 1, i + 2), PARAMETERS.AREA1) = GT then
    begin
      CheckLIC4 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
end;

function CheckLIC7: boolean;
var
  i, j: integer;
  dist: real;
begin
  CheckLIC7 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 3 then
    Exit;
  
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.N_PTS + 1 do
  begin
    for j := 1 to PARAMETERS.N_PTS - 2 do
    begin
      dist := Abs((X[i + PARAMETERS.N_PTS - 1] - X[i]) * (Y[i + j] - Y[i]) - 
                  (X[i + j] - X[i]) * (Y[i + PARAMETERS.N_PTS - 1] - Y[i])) /
              Sqrt(Sqr(X[i + PARAMETERS.N_PTS - 1] - X[i]) + Sqr(Y[i + PARAMETERS.N_PTS - 1] - Y[i]));
      if REALCOMPARE(dist, PARAMETERS.DIST) = GT then
      begin
        CheckLIC7 := true;
        Exit;
      end;
    end;
  end;
end;

function CheckLIC8: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  CheckLIC8 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 3 then
    Exit;
  
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.K_PTS - 1 do
    if REALCOMPARE(Distance(i, i + PARAMETERS.K_PTS + 1), PARAMETERS.LENGTH1) = GT then
    begin
      CheckLIC8 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
end;

function ExtractReal(const s: string; const key: string): real;
var
  startIdx, endIdx: integer;
  valueStr: string;
begin
  startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '":', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
    startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '" :', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
  begin
    ExtractReal := 0.0;
    Exit;
  end;
  
  startIdx := startIdx + Length('"' + key + '":');
  while (startIdx <= Length(s)) and (s[startIdx] in [' ', ':']) do
    Inc(startIdx);
  
  endIdx := startIdx;
  while (endIdx <= Length(s)) and (s[endIdx] in ['0'..'9', '.', '-', '+', 'e', 'E']) do
    Inc(endIdx);
  
  valueStr := Copy(s, startIdx, endIdx - startIdx);
  ExtractReal := StrToFloat(valueStr);
end;

function ExtractInt(const s: string; const key: string): integer;
var
  startIdx, endIdx: integer;
  valueStr: string;
begin
  startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '":', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
    startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '" :', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
  begin
    ExtractInt := 0;
    Exit;
  end;
  
  startIdx := startIdx + Length('"' + key + '":');
  while (startIdx <= Length(s)) and (s[startIdx] in [' ', ':']) do
    Inc(startIdx);
  
  endIdx := startIdx;
  while (endIdx <= Length(s)) and (s[endIdx] in ['0'..'9', '-']) do
    Inc(endIdx);
  
  valueStr := Copy(s, startIdx, endIdx - startIdx);
  ExtractInt := StrToInt(valueStr);
end;

procedure ParseRealArray(const arrStr: string; var arr: COORDINATE);
var
  i, startIdx, endIdx: integer;
  valueStr: string;
  temp: string;
begin
  temp := arrStr;
  if (Length(temp) > 0) and (temp[1] = '[') then
    temp := Copy(temp, 2, Length(temp) - 2);
  if (Length(temp) > 0) and (temp[Length(temp)] = ']') then
    temp := Copy(temp, 1, Length(temp) - 1);
  
  i := 1;
  startIdx := 1;
  while startIdx <= Length(temp) do
  begin
    while (startIdx <= Length(temp)) and (temp[startIdx] in [' ', ',', '[', ']']) do
      Inc(startIdx);
    if startIdx > Length(temp) then
      Break;
    
    endIdx := startIdx;
    while (endIdx <= Length(temp)) and (temp[endIdx] in ['0'..'9', '.', '-', '+', 'e', 'E']) do
      Inc(endIdx);
    
    if endIdx > startIdx then
    begin
      valueStr := Copy(temp, startIdx, endIdx - startIdx);
      if i <= 100 then
        arr[i] := StrToFloat(valueStr);
      Inc(i);
    end;
    startIdx := endIdx + 1;
  end;
end;

function ExtractArray(const s: string; const key: string): string;
var
  startIdx, endIdx, bracketCount: integer;
begin
  startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '":', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
    startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '" :', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
  begin
    ExtractArray := '';
    Exit;
  end;
  
  startIdx := Pos('[', Copy(s, startIdx, Length(s) - startIdx + 1));
  if startIdx = 0 then
  begin
    ExtractArray := '';
    Exit;
  end;
  startIdx := startIdx + Pos('[', Copy(s, startIdx, Length(s) - startIdx + 1)) - 1;
  
  bracketCount := 0;
  endIdx := startIdx;
  while endIdx <= Length(s) do
  begin
    if s[endIdx] = '[' then
      Inc(bracketCount)
    else if s[endIdx] = ']' then
    begin
      Dec(bracketCount);
      if bracketCount = 0 then
        Break;
    end;
    Inc(endIdx);
  end;
  
  ExtractArray := Copy(s, startIdx, endIdx - startIdx + 1);
end;

begin
  inputStr := '{"numpoints":3,"x":[-2.559691018288433,-54.1361818475631,-27.588055388240747],"y":[11.599235029279043,53.41599570619101,-73.14631701810059],"parameters":{"LENGTH1":16.872702913490567,"RADIUS1":6.494748839167508,"EPSILON":2.7005423573252862,"AREA1":27.243984680121446,"Q_PTS":2,"QUADS":2,"DIST":7.055489792487313,"N_PTS":3,"K_PTS":1,"A_PTS":1,"B_PTS":1,"C_PTS":1,"D_PTS":1,"E_PTS":1,"F_PTS":1,"G_PTS":1,"LENGTH2":11.464681929016038,"RADIUS2":7.585810697910844,"AREA2":5.7954429874053695},"lcm":[],"pum_diag":[]}';
  
  NUMPOINTS := ExtractInt(inputStr, 'numpoints');
  ParseRealArray(ExtractArray(inputStr, 'x'), X);
  ParseRealArray(ExtractArray(inputStr, 'y'), Y);
  
  PARAMETERS.LENGTH1 := ExtractReal(inputStr, 'LENGTH1');
  PARAMETERS.RADIUS1 := ExtractReal(inputStr, 'RADIUS1');
  PARAMETERS.EPSILON := ExtractReal(inputStr, 'EPSILON');
  PARAMETERS.AREA1 := ExtractReal(inputStr, 'AREA1');
  PARAMETERS.DIST := ExtractReal(inputStr, 'DIST');
  PARAMETERS.N_PTS := ExtractInt(inputStr, 'N_PTS');
  PARAMETERS.K_PTS := ExtractInt(inputStr, 'K_PTS');
  
  WriteLn('NUMPOINTS = ', NUMPOINTS);
  WriteLn('X[1]=', X[1]:0:6, ' X[2]=', X[2]:0:6, ' X[3]=', X[3]:0:6);
  WriteLn('Y[1]=', Y[1]:0:6, ' Y[2]=', Y[2]:0:6, ' Y[3]=', Y[3]:0:6);
  WriteLn('LENGTH1 = ', PARAMETERS.LENGTH1:0:6);
  WriteLn('RADIUS1 = ', PARAMETERS.RADIUS1:0:6);
  WriteLn('EPSILON = ', PARAMETERS.EPSILON:0:6);
  WriteLn('AREA1 = ', PARAMETERS.AREA1:0:6);
  WriteLn('DIST = ', PARAMETERS.DIST:0:6);
  WriteLn('N_PTS = ', PARAMETERS.N_PTS);
  WriteLn('K_PTS = ', PARAMETERS.K_PTS);
  WriteLn('');
  
  WriteLn('Distance(1,2) = ', Distance(1, 2):0:6);
  WriteLn('Distance(1,3) = ', Distance(1, 3):0:6);
  WriteLn('Distance(2,3) = ', Distance(2, 3):0:6);
  WriteLn('');
  
  WriteLn('LIC1 (dist > ', PARAMETERS.LENGTH1:0:6, '): ', CheckLIC1);
  WriteLn('LIC2 (circumradius > ', PARAMETERS.RADIUS1:0:6, '): ', CheckLIC2);
  WriteLn('LIC3 (angle outside [', PI - PARAMETERS.EPSILON:0:6, ', ', PI + PARAMETERS.EPSILON:0:6, ']): ', CheckLIC3);
  WriteLn('LIC4 (area > ', PARAMETERS.AREA1:0:6, '): ', CheckLIC4);
  WriteLn('LIC7 (point dist from line > ', PARAMETERS.DIST:0:6, '): ', CheckLIC7);
  WriteLn('LIC8 (dist with K_PTS=1 > ', PARAMETERS.LENGTH1:0:6, '): ', CheckLIC8);
end.

{$mode objfpc}{$H+}

uses
  SysUtils, Classes, Math;

const
  PI = 3.1415926535;

type
  POINTRANGE  = 1..100;
  LICRANGE    = 1..15;
  NPOINTS     = 2..100;
  NPTYPE      = 3..100;
  CONNECTORS  = (NOTUSED, ORR, ANDD);
  NUMQUADS    = 1..3;
  COORDINATE  = array[POINTRANGE] of real;
  CMATRIX     = array[LICRANGE, LICRANGE] of CONNECTORS;
  BMATRIX     = array[LICRANGE, LICRANGE] of boolean;
  VECTOR      = array[LICRANGE] of boolean;
  COMPTYPE    = (LT, EQ, GT);

var
  X          : COORDINATE;
  Y          : COORDINATE;
  NUMPOINTS  : NPOINTS;
  PARAMETERS : record
    LENGTH1  : real;
    RADIUS1  : real;
    EPSILON  : real;
    AREA1    : real;
    Q_PTS    : NPOINTS;
    QUADS    : NUMQUADS;
    DIST     : real;
    N_PTS    : NPTYPE;
    K_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    A_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    B_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    C_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    D_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    E_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    F_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    G_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    LENGTH2  : real;
    RADIUS2  : real;
    AREA2    : real;
  end;
  LCM     : CMATRIX;
  PUM     : BMATRIX;
  PUM_DIAG: array[LICRANGE] of boolean;
  CMV     : VECTOR;
  FUV     : VECTOR;
  LAUNCH  : boolean;

function REALCOMPARE(A, B: real): COMPTYPE;
var
  scale, eps, diff: real;
begin
  scale := Abs(A);
  if Abs(B) > scale then
    scale := Abs(B);
  if scale = 0.0 then
  begin
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
    Exit;
  end;

  eps := 0.5e-5 * scale;
  diff := A - B;
  if diff > eps then
    REALCOMPARE := GT
  else if diff < -eps then
    REALCOMPARE := LT
  else
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
end;

function Distance(i, j: integer): real;
begin
  Distance := Sqrt(Sqr(X[i] - X[j]) + Sqr(Y[i] - Y[j]));
end;

function TriangleArea(i, j, k: integer): real;
begin
  TriangleArea := Abs((X[j] - X[i]) * (Y[k] - Y[i]) - (X[k] - X[i]) * (Y[j] - Y[i])) / 2.0;
end;

function GetQuadrant(i: integer): integer;
begin
  if X[i] > 0 then
  begin
    if Y[i] >= 0 then
      GetQuadrant := 1
    else
      GetQuadrant := 4;
  end
  else if X[i] < 0 then
  begin
    if Y[i] >= 0 then
      GetQuadrant := 2
    else
      GetQuadrant := 3;
  end
  else
  begin
    if Y[i] >= 0 then
      GetQuadrant := 1
    else
      GetQuadrant := 3;
  end;
end;

function CountQuadrants(startIdx, count: integer): integer;
var
  quadSet: array[1..4] of boolean;
  i, q, idx: integer;
begin
  for i := 1 to 4 do
    quadSet[i] := false;
  
  for i := 0 to count - 1 do
  begin
    idx := startIdx + i;
    q := GetQuadrant(idx);
    quadSet[q] := true;
  end;
  
  CountQuadrants := 0;
  for i := 1 to 4 do
    if quadSet[i] then
      Inc(CountQuadrants);
end;

function Circumradius(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  a, b, c, area: real;
begin
  a := Distance(i, j);
  b := Distance(j, k);
  c := Distance(i, k);
  area := TriangleArea(i, j, k);
  
  if REALCOMPARE(area, 0.0) = EQ then
    Circumradius := 0.0
  else
    Circumradius := (a * b * c) / (4.0 * area);
end;

function AngleAtVertex(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  ax, ay, bx, by: real;
  dotProd, magA, magB, cosAngle: real;
begin
  ax := X[i] - X[j];
  ay := Y[i] - Y[j];
  bx := X[k] - X[j];
  by := Y[k] - Y[j];
  
  dotProd := ax * bx + ay * by;
  magA := Sqrt(Sqr(ax) + Sqr(ay));
  magB := Sqrt(Sqr(bx) + Sqr(by));
  
  if (REALCOMPARE(magA, 0.0) = EQ) or (REALCOMPARE(magB, 0.0) = EQ) then
  begin
    AngleAtVertex := -1.0;
    Exit;
  end;
  
  cosAngle := dotProd / (magA * magB);
  if cosAngle > 1.0 then
    cosAngle := 1.0
  else if cosAngle < -1.0 then
    cosAngle := -1.0;
  
  AngleAtVertex := ArcCos(cosAngle);
end;

function PointLineDistance(ptIdx, lineStartIdx, lineEndIdx: integer): real;
var
  x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3: real;
  dx, dy, num, denom: real;
begin
  x1 := X[lineStartIdx];
  y1 := Y[lineStartIdx];
  x2 := X[lineEndIdx];
  y2 := Y[lineEndIdx];
  x3 := X[ptIdx];
  y3 := Y[ptIdx];
  
  dx := x2 - x1;
  dy := y2 - y1;
  
  if (REALCOMPARE(dx, 0.0) = EQ) and (REALCOMPARE(dy, 0.0) = EQ) then
  begin
    PointLineDistance := Sqrt(Sqr(x3 - x1) + Sqr(y3 - y1));
    Exit;
  end;
  
  num := Abs(dy * x3 - dx * y3 + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1);
  denom := Sqrt(Sqr(dx) + Sqr(dy));
  
  PointLineDistance := num / denom;
end;

function CheckLIC1: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  CheckLIC1 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Distance(i, i + 1), PARAMETERS.LENGTH1) = GT then
    begin
      CheckLIC1 := true;

    end;
  end;
end;

function CheckLIC2: boolean;

begin

end;

function CheckLIC3: boolean;

end;

function CheckLIC5: boolean;

function CheckLIC6: boolean;
var

begin

function CheckLIC7: boolean;
var

begin

function CheckLIC8: boolean;
var

  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.K_PTS - 1 do

function CheckLIC9: boolean;

begin

  CMV[15] := CheckLIC15;
end;

procedure ComputePUM;
var
  i, j: integer;
begin
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if i = j then
        PUM[i, j] := PUM_DIAG[i]
      else
      begin
        case LCM[i, j] of
          NOTUSED: PUM[i, j] := true;
          ANDD: PUM[i, j] := CMV[i] and CMV[j];
          ORR: PUM[i, j] := CMV[i] or CMV[j];
        end;
      end;
    end;
  end;
end;

procedure ComputeFUV;
var
  i, j: integer;
  allTrue: boolean;
begin
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if not PUM[i, i] then
      FUV[i] := true
    else
    begin
      allTrue := true;
      for j := 1 to 15 do
      begin
        if not PUM[i, j] then
        begin
          allTrue := false;
          Break;
        end;
      end;
      FUV[i] := allTrue;
    end;
  end;
end;

procedure ComputeLaunch;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  LAUNCH := true;
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if not FUV[i] then
    begin
      LAUNCH := false;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

procedure DECIDE;
begin
  ComputeCMV;
  ComputePUM;
  ComputeFUV;
  ComputeLaunch;
end;

var
  inputStr, jsonStr: string;
  i, j, idx: integer;
  tokens: TStringList;
  cmvStr, pumStr, fuvStr: string;
  connectorStr: string;

function ExtractArray(const s: string; const key: string): string;
var
  startIdx, endIdx, bracketCount: integer;
begin
  startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '":', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
    startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '" :', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
  begin
    ExtractArray := '';
    Exit;
  end;
  
  startIdx := Pos('[', Copy(s, startIdx, Length(s) - startIdx + 1));
  if startIdx = 0 then
  begin
    ExtractArray := '';
    Exit;
  end;
  startIdx := startIdx + Pos('[', Copy(s, startIdx, Length(s) - startIdx + 1)) - 1;
  
  bracketCount := 0;
  endIdx := startIdx;
  while endIdx <= Length(s) do
  begin
    if s[endIdx] = '[' then
      Inc(bracketCount)
    else if s[endIdx] = ']' then
    begin
      Dec(bracketCount);
      if bracketCount = 0 then
        Break;
    end;
    Inc(endIdx);
  end;
  
  ExtractArray := Copy(s, startIdx, endIdx - startIdx + 1);
end;

function ExtractReal(const s: string; const key: string): real;
var
  startIdx, endIdx: integer;
  valueStr: string;
begin
  startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '":', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
    startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '" :', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
  begin
    ExtractReal := 0.0;
    Exit;
  end;
  
  startIdx := startIdx + Length('"' + key + '":');
  while (startIdx <= Length(s)) and (s[startIdx] in [' ', ':']) do
    Inc(startIdx);
  
  endIdx := startIdx;
  while (endIdx <= Length(s)) and (s[endIdx] in ['0'..'9', '.', '-', '+', 'e', 'E']) do
    Inc(endIdx);
  
  valueStr := Copy(s, startIdx, endIdx - startIdx);
  ExtractReal := StrToFloat(valueStr);
end;

function ExtractInt(const s: string; const key: string): integer;
var
  startIdx, endIdx: integer;
  valueStr: string;
begin
  startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '":', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
    startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '" :', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
  begin
    ExtractInt := 0;
    Exit;
  end;
  
  startIdx := startIdx + Length('"' + key + '":');
  while (startIdx <= Length(s)) and (s[startIdx] in [' ', ':']) do
    Inc(startIdx);
  
  endIdx := startIdx;
  while (endIdx <= Length(s)) and (s[endIdx] in ['0'..'9', '-']) do
    Inc(endIdx);
  
  valueStr := Copy(s, startIdx, endIdx - startIdx);
  ExtractInt := StrToInt(valueStr);
end;

function ExtractBool(const s: string; const key: string): boolean;
var
  startIdx: integer;
  sub: string;
begin
  startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '":', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
    startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '" :', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
  begin
    ExtractBool := false;
    Exit;
  end;
  
  startIdx := startIdx + Length('"' + key + '":');
  while (startIdx <= Length(s)) and (s[startIdx] in [' ', ':']) do
    Inc(startIdx);
  
  sub := Copy(s, startIdx, 4);
  ExtractBool := Pos('true', sub) > 0;
end;

function ExtractString(const s: string; const key: string): string;
var
  startIdx, endIdx: integer;
begin
  startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '":', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
    startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '" :', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
  begin
    ExtractString := '';
    Exit;
  end;
  
  startIdx := startIdx + Length('"' + key + '":');
  while (startIdx <= Length(s)) and (s[startIdx] in [' ', ':', '"']) do
    Inc(startIdx);
  Dec(startIdx);
  
  endIdx := startIdx + 1;
  while (endIdx <= Length(s)) and (s[endIdx] <> '"') do
    Inc(endIdx);
  
  ExtractString := Copy(s, startIdx + 1, endIdx - startIdx - 1);
end;

procedure ParseRealArray(const arrStr: string; var arr: array of real);
var
  i, startIdx, endIdx: integer;
  valueStr: string;
  temp: string;
begin
  temp := arrStr;
  if temp[1] = '[' then
    temp := Copy(temp, 2, Length(temp) - 2);
  if temp[Length(temp)] = ']' then
    temp := Copy(temp, 1, Length(temp) - 1);
  
  i := 0;
  startIdx := 1;
  while startIdx <= Length(temp) do
  begin
    while (startIdx <= Length(temp)) and (temp[startIdx] in [' ', ',', '[', ']']) do
      Inc(startIdx);
    if startIdx > Length(temp) then
      Break;
    
    endIdx := startIdx;
    while (endIdx <= Length(temp)) and (temp[endIdx] in ['0'..'9', '.', '-', '+', 'e', 'E']) do
      Inc(endIdx);
    
    if endIdx > startIdx then
    begin
      valueStr := Copy(temp, startIdx, endIdx - startIdx);
      if i < Length(arr) then
        arr[i] := StrToFloat(valueStr);
      Inc(i);
    end;
    startIdx := endIdx + 1;
  end;
end;

procedure ParseBoolArray(const arrStr: string; var arr: array of boolean);
var
  i, pos: integer;
begin
  i := 0;
  pos := 1;
  while pos <= Length(arrStr) do
  begin
    if Copy(arrStr, pos, 4) = 'true' then
    begin
      if i < Length(arr) then
        arr[i] := true;
      Inc(i);
      Inc(pos, 4);
    end
    else if Copy(arrStr, pos, 5) = 'false' then
    begin
      if i < Length(arr) then
        arr[i] := false;
      Inc(i);
      Inc(pos, 5);
    end
    else
      Inc(pos);
  end;
end;

procedure ParseLCM(const arrStr: string);
var
  i, j, pos: integer;
  connStr: string;
begin
  i := 1;
  j := 1;
  pos := 1;
  
  while (i <= 15) and (j <= 15) and (pos <= Length(arrStr)) do
  begin
    while (pos <= Length(arrStr)) and not (arrStr[pos] in ['A'..'Z', 'a'..'z']) do
      Inc(pos);
    
    if pos > Length(arrStr) then
      Break;
    
    connStr := '';
    while (pos <= Length(arrStr)) and (arrStr[pos] in ['A'..'Z', 'a'..'z']) do
    begin
      connStr := connStr + arrStr[pos];
      Inc(pos);
    end;
    
    connStr := UpperCase(connStr);
    if connStr = 'NOTUSED' then
      LCM[i, j] := NOTUSED
    else if connStr = 'ORR' then
      LCM[i, j] := ORR
    else if connStr = 'ANDD' then
      LCM[i, j] := ANDD;
    
    Inc(j);
    if j > 15 then
    begin
      j := 1;
      Inc(i);
    end;
  end;
end;

begin
  inputStr := '';
  while not EOF(Input) do
  begin
    ReadLn(inputStr);
  end;
  
  NUMPOINTS := ExtractInt(inputStr, 'numpoints');
  
  ParseRealArray(ExtractArray(inputStr, 'x'), X);
  ParseRealArray(ExtractArray(inputStr, 'y'), Y);
  
  PARAMETERS.LENGTH1 := ExtractReal(inputStr, 'LENGTH1');
  PARAMETERS.RADIUS1 := ExtractReal(inputStr, 'RADIUS1');
  PARAMETERS.EPSILON := ExtractReal(inputStr, 'EPSILON');
  PARAMETERS.AREA1 := ExtractReal(inputStr, 'AREA1');
  PARAMETERS.Q_PTS := ExtractInt(inputStr, 'Q_PTS');
  PARAMETERS.QUADS := ExtractInt(inputStr, 'QUADS');
  PARAMETERS.DIST := ExtractReal(inputStr, 'DIST');
  PARAMETERS.N_PTS := ExtractInt(inputStr, 'N_PTS');
  PARAMETERS.K_PTS := ExtractInt(inputStr, 'K_PTS');
  PARAMETERS.A_PTS := ExtractInt(inputStr, 'A_PTS');
  PARAMETERS.B_PTS := ExtractInt(inputStr, 'B_PTS');
  PARAMETERS.C_PTS := ExtractInt(inputStr, 'C_PTS');
  PARAMETERS.D_PTS := ExtractInt(inputStr, 'D_PTS');
  PARAMETERS.E_PTS := ExtractInt(inputStr, 'E_PTS');
  PARAMETERS.F_PTS := ExtractInt(inputStr, 'F_PTS');
  PARAMETERS.G_PTS := ExtractInt(inputStr, 'G_PTS');
  PARAMETERS.LENGTH2 := ExtractReal(inputStr, 'LENGTH2');
  PARAMETERS.RADIUS2 := ExtractReal(inputStr, 'RADIUS2');
  PARAMETERS.AREA2 := ExtractReal(inputStr, 'AREA2');
  
  ParseLCM(ExtractArray(inputStr, 'lcm'));
  ParseBoolArray(ExtractArray(inputStr, 'pum_diag'), PUM_DIAG);
  
  DECIDE;
  
  cmvStr := '[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if i > 1 then
      cmvStr := cmvStr + ',';
    if CMV[i] then
      cmvStr := cmvStr + 'true'
    else
      cmvStr := cmvStr + 'false';
  end;
  cmvStr := cmvStr + ']';
  
  pumStr := '[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if i > 1 then
      pumStr := pumStr + ',';
    pumStr := pumStr + '[';
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if j > 1 then
        pumStr := pumStr + ',';
      if PUM[i, j] then
        pumStr := pumStr + 'true'
      else
        pumStr := pumStr + 'false';
    end;
    pumStr := pumStr + ']';
  end;
  pumStr := pumStr + ']';
  
  fuvStr := '[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if i > 1 then
      fuvStr := fuvStr + ',';
    if FUV[i] then
      fuvStr := fuvStr + 'true'
    else
      fuvStr := fuvStr + 'false';
  end;
  fuvStr := fuvStr + ']';
  
  WriteLn('{"cmv":' + cmvStr + ',"pum":' + pumStr + ',"fuv":' + fuvStr + ',"launch":' + BoolToStr(LAUNCH, 'true', 'false') + '}');
end.
","after":"program LIPDecide;

{$mode objfpc}{$H+}

uses
  SysUtils, Classes, Math;

const
  PI = 3.1415926535;

type
  POINTRANGE  = 1..100;
  LICRANGE    = 1..15;
  NPOINTS     = 2..100;
  NPTYPE      = 3..100;
  CONNECTORS  = (NOTUSED, ORR, ANDD);
  NUMQUADS    = 1..3;
  COORDINATE  = array[POINTRANGE] of real;
  CMATRIX     = array[LICRANGE, LICRANGE] of CONNECTORS;
  BMATRIX     = array[LICRANGE, LICRANGE] of boolean;
  VECTOR      = array[LICRANGE] of boolean;
  COMPTYPE    = (LT, EQ, GT);

var
  X          : COORDINATE;
  Y          : COORDINATE;
  NUMPOINTS  : NPOINTS;
  PARAMETERS : record
    LENGTH1  : real;
    RADIUS1  : real;
    EPSILON  : real;
    AREA1    : real;
    Q_PTS    : NPOINTS;
    QUADS    : NUMQUADS;
    DIST     : real;
    N_PTS    : NPTYPE;
    K_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    A_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    B_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    C_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    D_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    E_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    F_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    G_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    LENGTH2  : real;
    RADIUS2  : real;
    AREA2    : real;
  end;
  LCM     : CMATRIX;
  PUM     : BMATRIX;
  PUM_DIAG: array[LICRANGE] of boolean;
  CMV     : VECTOR;
  FUV     : VECTOR;
  LAUNCH  : boolean;

function REALCOMPARE(A, B: real): COMPTYPE;
var
  scale, eps, diff: real;
begin
  scale := Abs(A);
  if Abs(B) > scale then
    scale := Abs(B);
  if scale = 0.0 then
  begin
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
    Exit;
  end;

  eps := 0.5e-5 * scale;
  diff := A - B;
  if diff > eps then
    REALCOMPARE := GT
  else if diff < -eps then
    REALCOMPARE := LT
  else
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
end;

function Distance(i, j: integer): real;
begin
  Distance := Sqrt(Sqr(X[i] - X[j]) + Sqr(Y[i] - Y[j]));
end;

function TriangleArea(i, j, k: integer): real;
begin
  TriangleArea := Abs((X[j] - X[i]) * (Y[k] - Y[i]) - (X[k] - X[i]) * (Y[j] - Y[i])) / 2.0;
end;

function GetQuadrant(i: integer): integer;
begin
  if X[i] > 0 then
  begin
    if Y[i] >= 0 then
      GetQuadrant := 1
    else
      GetQuadrant := 4;
  end
  else if X[i] < 0 then
  begin
    if Y[i] >= 0 then
      GetQuadrant := 2
    else
      GetQuadrant := 3;
  end
  else
  begin
    if Y[i] >= 0 then
      GetQuadrant := 1
    else
      GetQuadrant := 3;
  end;
end;

function CountQuadrants(startIdx, count: integer): integer;
var
  quadSet: array[1..4] of boolean;
  i, q, idx: integer;
begin
  for i := 1 to 4 do
    quadSet[i] := false;
  
  for i := 0 to count - 1 do
  begin
    idx := startIdx + i;
    q := GetQuadrant(idx);
    quadSet[q] := true;
  end;
  
  CountQuadrants := 0;
  for i := 1 to 4 do
    if quadSet[i] then
      Inc(CountQuadrants);
end;

function Circumradius(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  a, b, c, area: real;
begin
  a := Distance(i, j);
  b := Distance(j, k);
  c := Distance(i, k);
  area := TriangleArea(i, j, k);
  
  if REALCOMPARE(area, 0.0) = EQ then
    Circumradius := 0.0
  else
    Circumradius := (a * b * c) / (4.0 * area);
end;

function AngleAtVertex(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  ax, ay, bx, by: real;
  dotProd, magA, magB, cosAngle: real;
begin
  ax := X[i] - X[j];
  ay := Y[i] - Y[j];
  bx := X[k] - X[j];
  by := Y[k] - Y[j];
  
  dotProd := ax * bx + ay * by;
  magA := Sqrt(Sqr(ax) + Sqr(ay));
  magB := Sqrt(Sqr(bx) + Sqr(by));
  
  if (REALCOMPARE(magA, 0.0) = EQ) or (REALCOMPARE(magB, 0.0) = EQ) then
  begin
    AngleAtVertex := -1.0;
    Exit;
  end;
  
  cosAngle := dotProd / (magA * magB);
  if cosAngle > 1.0 then
    cosAngle := 1.0
  else if cosAngle < -1.0 then
    cosAngle := -1.0;
  
  AngleAtVertex := ArcCos(cosAngle);
end;

function PointLineDistance(ptIdx, lineStartIdx, lineEndIdx: integer): real;
var
  x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3: real;
  dx, dy, num, denom: real;
begin
  x1 := X[lineStartIdx];
  y1 := Y[lineStartIdx];
  x2 := X[lineEndIdx];
  y2 := Y[lineEndIdx];
  x3 := X[ptIdx];
  y3 := Y[ptIdx];
  
  dx := x2 - x1;
  dy := y2 - y1;
  
  if (REALCOMPARE(dx, 0.0) = EQ) and (REALCOMPARE(dy, 0.0) = EQ) then
  begin
    PointLineDistance := Sqrt(Sqr(x3 - x1) + Sqr(y3 - y1));
    Exit;
  end;
  
  num := Abs(dy * x3 - dx * y3 + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1);
  denom := Sqrt(Sqr(dx) + Sqr(dy));
  
  PointLineDistance := num / denom;
end;

function CheckLIC1: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  CheckLIC1 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Distance(i, i + 1), PARAMETERS.LENGTH1) = GT then
    begin
      CheckLIC1 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function CheckLIC2: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  CheckLIC2 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Circumradius(i, i + 1, i + 2), PARAMETERS.RADIUS1) = GT then
    begin
      CheckLIC2 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function CheckLIC3: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
  angle: real;
begin
  CheckLIC3 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    angle := AngleAtVertex(i, i + 1, i + 2);
    if angle >= 0.0 then
    begin
      if (REALCOMPARE(angle, PI - PARAMETERS.EPSILON) = LT) or
         (REALCOMPARE(angle, PI + PARAMETERS.EPSILON) = GT) then
      begin
        CheckLIC3 := true;
        Exit;
      end;
    end;
  end;
end;

function CheckLIC4: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  CheckLIC4 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(TriangleArea(i, i + 1, i + 2), PARAMETERS.AREA1) = GT then
    begin
      CheckLIC4 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function CheckLIC5: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  CheckLIC5 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.Q_PTS + 1 do
  begin
    if CountQuadrants(i, PARAMETERS.Q_PTS) > PARAMETERS.QUADS then
    begin
      CheckLIC5 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function CheckLIC6: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  CheckLIC6 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(X[i + 1] - X[i], 0.0) = LT then
    begin
      CheckLIC6 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function CheckLIC7: boolean;
var
  i, j: integer;
begin
  CheckLIC7 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 3 then
    Exit;
  
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.N_PTS + 1 do
  begin
    for j := 1 to PARAMETERS.N_PTS - 2 do
    begin
      if REALCOMPARE(PointLineDistance(i + j, i, i + PARAMETERS.N_PTS - 1), PARAMETERS.DIST) = GT then
      begin
        CheckLIC7 := true;
        Exit;
      end;
    end;
  end;
end;

function CheckLIC8: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  CheckLIC8 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 3 then
    Exit;
  
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.K_PTS - 1 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Distance(i, i + PARAMETERS.K_PTS + 1), PARAMETERS.LENGTH1) = GT then
    begin
      CheckLIC8 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function CheckLIC9: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  CheckLIC9 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 5 then
    Exit;
  
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.A_PTS - PARAMETERS.B_PTS - 2 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Circumradius(i, i + PARAMETERS.A_PTS + 1, i + PARAMETERS.A_PTS + PARAMETERS.B_PTS + 2), PARAMETERS.RADIUS1) = GT then
    begin
      CheckLIC9 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function CheckLIC10: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
  angle: real;
begin
  CheckLIC10 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 5 then
    Exit;
  
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.C_PTS - PARAMETERS.D_PTS - 2 do
  begin
    angle := AngleAtVertex(i, i + PARAMETERS.C_PTS + 1, i + PARAMETERS.C_PTS + PARAMETERS.D_PTS + 2);
    if angle >= 0.0 then
    begin
      if (REALCOMPARE(angle, PI - PARAMETERS.EPSILON) = LT) or
         (REALCOMPARE(angle, PI + PARAMETERS.EPSILON) = GT) then
      begin
        CheckLIC10 := true;
        Exit;
      end;
    end;
  end;
end;

function CheckLIC11: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  CheckLIC11 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 5 then
    Exit;
  
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.E_PTS - PARAMETERS.F_PTS - 2 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(TriangleArea(i, i + PARAMETERS.E_PTS + 1, i + PARAMETERS.E_PTS + PARAMETERS.F_PTS + 2), PARAMETERS.AREA1) = GT then
    begin
      CheckLIC11 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function CheckLIC12: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  CheckLIC12 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 3 then
    Exit;
  
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.G_PTS - 1 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(X[i + PARAMETERS.G_PTS + 1] - X[i], 0.0) = LT then
    begin
      CheckLIC12 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function CheckLIC13: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
  hasGreater, hasLess: boolean;
begin
  CheckLIC13 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 3 then
    Exit;
  
  hasGreater := false;
  hasLess := false;
  
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.K_PTS - 1 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Distance(i, i + PARAMETERS.K_PTS + 1), PARAMETERS.LENGTH1) = GT then
      hasGreater := true;
    if REALCOMPARE(Distance(i, i + PARAMETERS.K_PTS + 1), PARAMETERS.LENGTH2) = LT then
      hasLess := true;
  end;
  
  CheckLIC13 := hasGreater and hasLess;
end;

function CheckLIC14: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
  cannotFit, canFit: boolean;
begin
  CheckLIC14 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 5 then
    Exit;
  
  cannotFit := false;
  canFit := false;
  
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.A_PTS - PARAMETERS.B_PTS - 2 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Circumradius(i, i + PARAMETERS.A_PTS + 1, i + PARAMETERS.A_PTS + PARAMETERS.B_PTS + 2), PARAMETERS.RADIUS1) = GT then
      cannotFit := true;
    if REALCOMPARE(Circumradius(i, i + PARAMETERS.A_PTS + 1, i + PARAMETERS.A_PTS + PARAMETERS.B_PTS + 2), PARAMETERS.RADIUS2) <> GT then
      canFit := true;
  end;
  
  CheckLIC14 := cannotFit and canFit;
end;

function CheckLIC15: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
  hasGreater, hasLess: boolean;
begin
  CheckLIC15 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 5 then
    Exit;
  
  hasGreater := false;
  hasLess := false;
  
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.E_PTS - PARAMETERS.F_PTS - 2 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(TriangleArea(i, i + PARAMETERS.E_PTS + 1, i + PARAMETERS.E_PTS + PARAMETERS.F_PTS + 2), PARAMETERS.AREA1) = GT then
      hasGreater := true;
    if REALCOMPARE(TriangleArea(i, i + PARAMETERS.E_PTS + 1, i + PARAMETERS.E_PTS + PARAMETERS.F_PTS + 2), PARAMETERS.AREA2) = LT then
      hasLess := true;
  end;
  
  CheckLIC15 := hasGreater and hasLess;
end;

procedure ComputeCMV;
begin
  CMV[1] := CheckLIC1;
  CMV[2] := CheckLIC2;
  CMV[3] := CheckLIC3;
  CMV[4] := CheckLIC4;
  CMV[5] := CheckLIC5;
  CMV[6] := CheckLIC6;
  CMV[7] := CheckLIC7;
  CMV[8] := CheckLIC8;
  CMV[9] := CheckLIC9;
  CMV[10] := CheckLIC10;
  CMV[11] := CheckLIC11;
  CMV[12] := CheckLIC12;
  CMV[13] := CheckLIC13;
  CMV[14] := CheckLIC14;
  CMV[15] := CheckLIC15;
end;

procedure ComputePUM;
var
  i, j: integer;
begin
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if i = j then
        PUM[i, j] := PUM_DIAG[i]
      else
      begin
        case LCM[i, j] of
          NOTUSED: PUM[i, j] := true;
          ANDD: PUM[i, j] := CMV[i] and CMV[j];
          ORR: PUM[i, j] := CMV[i] or CMV[j];
        end;
      end;
    end;
  end;
end;

procedure ComputeFUV;
var
  i, j: integer;
  allTrue: boolean;
begin
  for i := 1 to 15 do

function ExtractArray(const s: string; const key: string): string;
var
  startIdx, endIdx, bracketCount, searchStart: integer;
begin
  startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '":', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
    startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '" :', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
  begin
    ExtractArray := '';
    Exit;
  end;
  
  searchStart := startIdx + Length('"' + key + '":');
  startIdx := Pos('[', Copy(s, searchStart, Length(s) - searchStart + 1));
  if startIdx = 0 then
  begin
    ExtractArray := '';
    Exit;
  end;
  startIdx := searchStart + startIdx - 1;
  
  bracketCount := 0;
  endIdx := startIdx;
  while endIdx <= Length(s) do
  begin
    if s[endIdx] = '[' then
      Inc(bracketCount)
    else if s[endIdx] = ']' then
    begin
      Dec(bracketCount);
      if bracketCount = 0 then
        Break;
    end;
    Inc(endIdx);
  end;
  
  ExtractArray := Copy(s, startIdx, endIdx - startIdx + 1);
end;

function ExtractReal(const s: string; const key: string): real;
var
  startIdx, endIdx: integer;
  valueStr: string;
begin
  startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '":', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
    startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '" :', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
  begin
    ExtractReal := 0.0;
    Exit;
  end;
  
  startIdx := startIdx + Length('"' + key + '":');
  while (startIdx <= Length(s)) and (s[startIdx] in [' ', ':']) do
    Inc(startIdx);
  
  endIdx := startIdx;
  while (endIdx <= Length(s)) and (s[endIdx] in ['0'..'9', '.', '-', '+', 'e', 'E']) do
    Inc(endIdx);
  
  valueStr := Copy(s, startIdx, endIdx - startIdx);
  ExtractReal := StrToFloat(valueStr);
end;

function ExtractInt(const s: string; const key: string): integer;
var
  startIdx, endIdx: integer;
  valueStr: string;
begin
  startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '":', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
    startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '" :', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
  begin
    ExtractInt := 0;
    Exit;
  end;
  
  startIdx := startIdx + Length('"' + key + '":');
  while (startIdx <= Length(s)) and (s[startIdx] in [' ', ':']) do
    Inc(startIdx);
  
  endIdx := startIdx;
  while (endIdx <= Length(s)) and (s[endIdx] in ['0'..'9', '-']) do
    Inc(endIdx);
  
  valueStr := Copy(s, startIdx, endIdx - startIdx);
  ExtractInt := StrToInt(valueStr);
end;

function ExtractBool(const s: string; const key: string): boolean;
var
  startIdx: integer;
  sub: string;
begin
  startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '":', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
    startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '" :', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
  begin
    ExtractBool := false;
    Exit;
  end;
  
  startIdx := startIdx + Length('"' + key + '":');
  while (startIdx <= Length(s)) and (s[startIdx] in [' ', ':']) do
    Inc(startIdx);
  
  sub := Copy(s, startIdx, 4);
  ExtractBool := Pos('true', sub) > 0;
end;

function ExtractString(const s: string; const key: string): string;
var
  startIdx, endIdx: integer;
begin
  startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '":', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
    startIdx := Pos('"' + key + '" :', s);
  if startIdx = 0 then
  begin
    ExtractString := '';
    Exit;
  end;
  
  startIdx := startIdx + Length('"' + key + '":');
  while (startIdx <= Length(s)) and (s[startIdx] in [' ', ':', '"']) do
    Inc(startIdx);
  Dec(startIdx);
  
  endIdx := startIdx + 1;
  while (endIdx <= Length(s)) and (s[endIdx] <> '"') do
    Inc(endIdx);
  
  ExtractString := Copy(s, startIdx + 1, endIdx - startIdx - 1);
end;

procedure ParseRealArray(const arrStr: string; var arr: array of real);
var
  i, startIdx, endIdx: integer;
  valueStr: string;
  temp: string;
begin
  temp := arrStr;
  if temp[1] = '[' then
    temp := Copy(temp, 2, Length(temp) - 2);
  if temp[Length(temp)] = ']' then
    temp := Copy(temp, 1, Length(temp) - 1);
  
  i := 0;
  startIdx := 1;
  while startIdx <= Length(temp) do
  begin
    while (startIdx <= Length(temp)) and (temp[startIdx] in [' ', ',', '[', ']']) do
      Inc(startIdx);
    if startIdx > Length(temp) then
      Break;
    
    endIdx := startIdx;
    while (endIdx <= Length(temp)) and (temp[endIdx] in ['0'..'9', '.', '-', '+', 'e', 'E']) do
      Inc(endIdx);
    
    if endIdx > startIdx then
    begin
      valueStr := Copy(temp, startIdx, endIdx - startIdx);
      if i < Length(arr) then
        arr[i] := StrToFloat(valueStr);
      Inc(i);
    end;
    startIdx := endIdx + 1;
  end;
end;

procedure ParseBoolArray(const arrStr: string; var arr: array of boolean);
var
  i, pos: integer;
begin
  i := 0;
  pos := 1;
  while pos <= Length(arrStr) do
  begin
    if Copy(arrStr, pos, 4) = 'true' then
    begin
      if i < Length(arr) then
        arr[i] := true;
      Inc(i);
      Inc(pos, 4);
    end
    else if Copy(arrStr, pos, 5) = 'false' then
    begin
      if i < Length(arr) then
        arr[i] := false;
      Inc(i);
      Inc(pos, 5);
    end
    else
      Inc(pos);
  end;
end;

procedure ParseLCM(const arrStr: string);
var
  i, j, pos: integer;
  connStr: string;
begin
  i := 1;
  j := 1;
  pos := 1;
  
  while (i <= 15) and (j <= 15) and (pos <= Length(arrStr)) do
  begin
    while (pos <= Length(arrStr)) and not (arrStr[pos] in ['A'..'Z', 'a'..'z']) do
      Inc(pos);
    
    if pos > Length(arrStr) then
      Break;
    
    connStr := '';
    while (pos <= Length(arrStr)) and (arrStr[pos] in ['A'..'Z', 'a'..'z']) do
    begin
      connStr := connStr + arrStr[pos];
      Inc(pos);
    end;
    
    connStr := UpperCase(connStr);
    if connStr = 'NOTUSED' then
      LCM[i, j] := NOTUSED
    else if connStr = 'ORR' then
      LCM[i, j] := ORR
    else if connStr = 'ANDD' then
      LCM[i, j] := ANDD;
    
    Inc(j);
    if j > 15 then
    begin
      j := 1;
      Inc(i);
    end;
  end;
end;
